description: A vertical graphic on a dark navy background. Large cream serif text at the top reads PROTECT THE HOMELAND, DEFEND AMERICA. A Department of Homeland Security seal and the words U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services sit in the center. The lower half shows a drawn, waving U.S. flag on a pole in red, white, and blue.
notable_text: PROTECT THE HOMELAND; DEFEND AMERICA; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
